improvements: Require retry tests to be parameterized across every configured retryable status code, not just a subset.
Require at least one explicit retry-exhaustion test asserting attempt count, backoff sequence, and terminal error behavior.
Require prompt/template parsers to normalize line endings (CRLF, CR, LF) and include cross-platform parsing unit tests.
Require logging tests to cover both success and retry paths for audit fields (for example prompt SHA-256).
Require one test that validates default runtime artifact paths are correct when not monkeypatched.
